---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new lint rule, pattern, doc, or template improvement.
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What does an adopter or AI coding agent currently get wrong in this template,
and why?

## Proposed change

Concrete: a new lint rule, a doc section, a pattern file, a CI step. Link to
related files / docs.

## Why it fits the template

This template is opinionated. New features should either:

- Encode an existing documented convention as a lint rule, or
- Document a recurring pattern with an in-repo example.

Features that only add optional configuration usually don't fit.

## Alternatives considered

What did you rule out, and why?
